domain_archetypes.name: turing evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: turing signal changes while college context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: college boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: college handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: sells regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: sells behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: based operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: based output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
